description: Create a contents slide for the Shifting priorities CRO agendas report with a full-layout chapter list and report title/subtitle.

header.headline: Shifting priorities: CRO agendas in a time of uncertainty and innovation
header.sub: 15th annual EY/IIF global bank risk management survey

items.text: 11 Chapter 1: the macro forces framing the CRO agenda
14 Chapter 2: the return of financial and traditional risks in new forms
18 Chapter 3: AI and disruptive technology – balancing risk and opportunity
24 Chapter 4: regulatory outlook – navigating the impacts of fragmentation
28 Chapter 5: risk management operations – new tech, talent and team structures
